metadata.description: Agent skills for the Envoy ecosystem — Envoy Gateway, Envoy Proxy, and Envoy AI Gateway

plugins.name: envoy-gateway-adopters
plugins.description: Skills for developers deploying and configuring Envoy Gateway as a Kubernetes-native API gateway

plugins.name: envoy-ai-gateway-adopters
plugins.description: Skills for developers deploying and configuring Envoy AI Gateway for generative AI services

plugins.name: envoy-gateway-contributors
plugins.description: Skills for developers contributing to the Envoy Gateway codebase — architecture, xDS translation, CRD support, testing, and PR workflow

plugins.name: envoy-ai-gateway-contributors
plugins.description: Skills for developers contributing to the Envoy AI Gateway codebase — architecture, ExtProc internals, adding LLM provider translators and CRDs, testing, Go style, and PR workflow

plugins.name: envoy-shared-contributors
plugins.description: Shared Kubernetes controller skills for developers contributing to any Envoy control plane — reconcile loops, finalizers, controller testing, leader election, and CRD lifecycle
